objective: Activate candidate AI Assistant / IDE Work domain system with specialist domains, states, protocols, templates, and agents.
operator_signal: User identified missing specialist domains and agents for UI, documentation, IDE-agent work, and mass AI-assisted developer workflows.
external_research_context: GitHub Copilot / Copilot cloud agent documentation
VS Code Copilot agent mode blog
OpenAI Codex documentation and Agent Skills documentation
decisions: Treat AI assistant work as a superdomain spanning chat, IDE, CLI, cloud, PR, and background agent bodies.
Define assistant identity as host-body mounted work interface, not model/prompt/autocomplete alone.
Create first candidate specialist-domain system rather than routing UI/docs/IDE work to a generic coder.
Bind templates to specialist domains and specialist agents.
Preserve candidate-only boundary until explicit acceptance.
non_claims: This receipt does not accept the domain system into ION canon.
No external IDE, Codex, GitHub, MCP, daemon, or cloud-agent execution occurred.
No registry, product-front-door, or production mutation occurred.
External product docs/survey data are research evidence, not ION law.
